title: Kazakhstan Moves to Build a National Crypto Reserve Funded by Bitcoin Miners
summary: Kazakhstan is creating a national strategic crypto reserve funded by its bitcoin miners, following a presidential decree signed July 7 and a government resolution approved July 18. This move aims to regulate and supervise the country's large mining industry under a state-supervised system.
body:
Kazakhstan has laid out a plan to build a national strategic crypto reserve fed by its bitcoin miners, part of a two-step push by President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev to pull the country's large mining industry into a regulated, state-supervised system. A presidential decree signed July 7 sets the framework, and a government resolution approved July 18 supports the plan.

The reserve will be funded by the bitcoin mined within Kazakhstan, leveraging the country's significant mining infrastructure. Kazakhstan has become a major hub for bitcoin mining due to its cheap electricity and favorable climate for mining operations. The move is seen as a strategic effort to capitalize on the country's resources and integrate them into the national economy.

This development is significant for everyday people as it demonstrates how governments are increasingly recognizing the value of cryptocurrencies and seeking to integrate them into national economic strategies. For crypto users, this could mean more stability and legitimacy for bitcoin, as well as potential new opportunities for investment and participation in regulated markets.

The next steps for this initiative will likely involve the implementation of the regulatory framework and the establishment of the reserve. Crypto enthusiasts and investors should watch for updates on how this reserve will be managed and what impact it will have on the global bitcoin market. Read more → https://bitcoinmagazine.com/news/kazakhstan-to-build-a-national-crypto

This could mean more stability and legitimacy for bitcoin. Watch for updates on how this reserve will be managed and its impact on the global market. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-23-kazakhstan-plans-national-bitcoin-reserve-funded-by-miners
